news.headline: CBOE seeks to list Franklin Templeton Solana ETF. Other firms file for ETFs tracking the 6th largest crypto's value.
news.summary: In recent months, several major investment firms including Grayscale, Canary Capital, Bitwise, and 21Shares have submitted applications for Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) that would track the price of the sixth largest cryptocurrency by market value.

news.headline: Zynext Ventures invests in Illexcor Therapeutics for sickle cell therapy. USA LLC funded on March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Pennington, New Jersey, on March 12, 2025, Zynext Ventures USA LLC revealed their investment in Illexcor Therapeutics, a leading biopharmaceutical company. This investment comes as Zynext Ventures, the venture capital division of Zydus Lifesciences, continues to expand its portfolio. Illexcor specializes in developing advanced oral medications, contributing to the innovative landscape of biopharmaceuticals. This collaboration signifies a significant step forward in the industry, with Zynext Ventures demonstrating faith in Illexcor's potential. This investment showcases Zynext Ventures' commitment to fostering cutting-edge developments in the field.

news.headline: Casino Groupe reports 2024 financial statements.
Haffner Energy reveals H2 bois SA agreement for biomass plant in Switzerland, focusing on hydrogen, electricity, and biochar.
S&P upgrades Fnac Darty's outlook to "stable," maintains BB+ rating. Successful extension of undrawn RCF/DDTL maturities.
Treasury WI 10-year yield 4.315% before $39 billion auction.
Global market for Artificial Intelligence and Analytics in Surgery to surpass $950 million by 2030, grew at 24.5% CAGR from 2024, valued at $255.3 million in 2024.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recently released report on Artificial Intelligence and Analytics in Surgery is now available for access through a prominent research platform. The global market for this sector reached a value of US$255.3 Million in 2024. Projections indicate significant growth, with expectations to reach US$950.8 Million by 2030. This represents a substantial Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 24.5% from 2024 to 2030. The report offers detailed insights into market trends, key drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making informed decisions in this industry.

news.headline: INOVIO (NASDAQ: INO) will report Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 18, 2025. HPV-focused biotech company.
news.summary: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, on March 12, 2025, INOVIO revealed in a press release that they are a biotechnology firm concentrated on creating and marketing DNA treatments for combating HPV-linked illnesses, cancers, and infectious diseases. The company, listed on NASDAQ as INO, disclosed their financial results for the fourth quarter...

news.headline: Gilead reveals promising HIV treatment data with 95.4% HIV and 86.6% HBV virologic suppression in ongoing Phase 3 study.
news.summary: On a recent date, Gilead Sciences, Inc. shared information related to its HIV treatment lineup and development plans at the CROI 2025 event. The ALLIANCE study, an ongoing Phase 3 trial, is comparing the effectiveness of Biktarvy to a combination treatment of dolutegravir 50 mg + emtricitabine 200 mg/tenofovir disoproxil fumarate 300 mg (DTG+F/TDF) in adults with HIV-1/HBV coinfection who are starting treatment. Prior reports indicated positive outcomes for both drug regimens. Newly revealed data demonstrates that Biktarvy sustained impressive rates of HIV-1 (95.4%) and HBV (86.6%) virologic inhibition in participants (n=89) after transitioning to the treatment. This information can be found in further detail on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Solidion Technology's lithium-sulfur batteries achieve major milestones, validated by third party.
news.summary: A leading global company in ultrahigh energy density batteries, Solidion Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: STI), based in Dallas, has recently had their lithium-sulfur (Li-S) batteries validated by a third-party. This validation confirms the efficiency and reliability of their high-energy batteries. The development was announced on March 12, 2025. Solidion's Li-S batteries have shown exceptional performance, marking a significant milestone for the company in the energy storage sector. This achievement underscores the company's position as an innovative leader in the industry.

news.headline: Tricoci University adds Spray Tanning course to curriculum in time for National Spray Tan Day on March 20.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Tricoci University of Beauty Culture revealed the introduction of a Spray Tanning course, aligning with National Spray Tan Day on March 20. This addition showcases the institution's commitment to offering diverse educational opportunities. National Spray Tan Day on March 20 is recognized nationwide as a celebration of safe and professional methods for achieving a sun-kissed glow. The new course enhances the curriculum, providing students with valuable skills and knowledge in this popular beauty practice.

news.headline: Pluxee launches first commercial paper program (NEU CP) worth up to 400 million euros.
news.summary: Pluxee has revealed the introduction of its inaugural commercial paper initiative, known as NEU CP, with a total value of approximately 400 million euros.

news.headline: Argan's 2024 universal registration document now accessible in English for global stakeholders.
Sogeclair reports voting rights as of 2025/02/28 with a capital of €3,204,901 and 335,218,269 registry of commerce number.
news.summary: SOGECLAIR is a business corporation based in Blagnac, France, with a capital of €3,204,901. They can be contacted at +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71 or through their website www.sogeclair.com. The company is registered under RCS Toulouse with the number 335 218 269.

news.headline: Fed bids for 10-Yr Notes total $661.0 mln.
Indian officials arrest Garantex founder for US extradition, accused by CBI of money laundering linked to $27M.
news.summary: Indian authorities arrested Lithuanian national Aleksej Bešciokov, alleged founder of cryptocurrency exchange Garantex, on charges of money laundering, unlicensed money transmitting, and violating economic sanction laws. Bešciokov, along with Aleksandr Mira Serda, allegedly laundered proceeds from criminal activities through Garantex from 2019 onwards. $27 million worth of USDt was frozen by Tether on the platform, leading to its temporary suspension. The US Treasury and the EU have imposed sanctions on Garantex for AML/CFT violations and connections to Russian aggression in Ukraine. Serda, the co-founder of Garantex, remains at large. It is uncertain if Bešciokov will fight extradition to the US from India. Previous cases involving extradition for similar crimes have seen delays and appeals in the legal process.

news.headline: Captain D's to open first UK location in London this summer. Partnering with CD's Holdings for UK expansion.
news.summary: A renowned fast casual seafood chain, Captain D's, based in the U.S., has disclosed its collaboration with CD's Holdings for overseeing its expansion in the UK on March 12, 2025. CD's Holdings will act as the master franchisee, driving forward the growth of Captain D's in the region. This move comes as part of the restaurant's strategy to enhance its global presence and extend its reach to new markets. Captain D's is recognized for its high-quality seafood offerings and aims to leverage the expertise of CD's Holdings to establish a strong foothold in the UK market.

news.headline: Morgan Stanley lowers Apple stock price target due to lack of AI features to boost sales.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley, an investment bank, reduced its target price for Apple stock due to the absence of innovative AI features to boost iPhone sales. The new price target set by Morgan Stanley reflects a downward revision in their valuation analysis. The decision was influenced by the perceived lack of strong artificial intelligence capabilities that could stimulate consumer demand for iPhones. This adjustment underscores the importance of cutting-edge technology in driving the performance of tech companies in the stock market. The latest price target provided by Morgan Stanley highlights the challenges faced by Apple in maintaining its market position amidst evolving consumer preferences.

news.headline: Stock market mixed as Dow Jones falls, while other indexes rise post inflation signs; Nvidia rallies.992.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a decline, while other market indexes showed gains due to indications of inflation cooling down. The stock market today had mixed results, with Nvidia seeing a strong rally as tech giants Meta, Google, and Amazon signed a significant pledge. This update was provided in a live coverage by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the dynamic nature of the market with shifts in various indices. This further emphasizes the ongoing impact of economic factors and corporate commitments on the stock market performance.

news.headline: Topcon Agriculture integrates TAP FEED API with Connecterra for dairy farmers, enhancing data integration and analysis.
news.summary: In Livermore, California, Topcon Agriculture has introduced the integration of its TAP FEED API with Connecterra, marking a collaboration aimed at benefitting dairy farmers and agri-professionals with improved data integration and analysis tools. The recent agreement with Connecterra signals Topcon's dedication to fostering openness and collaboration within the agri-tech industry. Through this integration, users can expect enhanced capabilities for data exchange between Topcon's TAP FEED management system and Connecterra, facilitating streamlined operations and insights for agricultural activities.

news.headline: CME Group Inc. to release first-quarter 2025 earnings on April 23, 2025 before market open. Website highlights at 6:00 a.m. CT.
news.summary: CME Group Inc. is scheduled to report its first-quarter earnings for 2025 on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, before the market opens. The written highlights of the quarter will be available on the company's website at 6:00 a.m. Central Time. Investors and analysts are eagerly anticipating this important financial update from CME Group Inc.

news.headline: Sogeclair reports 2024 annual results: €157M turnover (+6.1%), €16.6M EBITDA (-0.6%), and €6.1M Net Result (+29.8%).
news.summary: In the 2024 annual results, the company reported a consolidated turnover of €157.0 million, showing a growth of 6.1% (5.9% at constant exchange rates) compared to the previous year. The EBITDA stood at €16.6 million, a slight decrease of 0.6%. However, the net result saw a significant increase of 29.8%, reaching €6.1 million. These numbers reflect a positive trend for the company's financial performance in the past year.

news.summary: In Chicago on March 12, 2025, Prairie Cannabis revealed the initiation of construction for its second retail dispensary in the city located at 622 W Roosevelt Rd, Chicago, IL 60607. The dispensary's anticipated opening is set for early April.

24 Kitchen Innovations Award recipients for 2025 announced at National Restaurant Association Show in Chicago.
news.summary: The 2025 Kitchen Innovations (KI) Award winners will be recognized in Chicago at the National Restaurant Association Restaurant, Hotel-Motel Show® on March 12, 2025. These innovative solutions range from equipment automation to IoT kitchen management tools. This prestigious award celebrates cutting-edge advancements in the foodservice industry, providing a platform for exceptional products. The honorees showcase the latest technologies with a focus on enhancing efficiency and productivity in restaurant operations. This year's winners represent a diverse array of solutions catering to the evolving needs of the industry, with a total of approximately X number of companies being recognized for their contributions.

news.headline: CrowdStrike partners with Accenture & Dicker Data, expanding its ANZ network to streamline cybersecurity; Aims to prevent breaches using Falcon platform.
news.summary: Wednesday saw CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) announcing two significant agreements. The first one involves a partnership with Dicker Data to distribute its CrowdStrike Falcon cybersecurity platform across Australia and New Zealand (ANZ). This collaboration expands CrowdStrike’s ANZ channel network, empowering Dicker Data’s broad network of resellers and managed service providers to enhance vendor management and bolster security through the Falcon platform. This deal aims to help partners upgrade their security capabilities and assist customers in minimizing vendor risks.

Economists and bankers in Europe express confusion over unpredictable policies, impacting economic outlook.
news.summary: A conference in Europe attended by central bankers, economists, and analysts reflected a sense of confusion as they deliberated on the uncertainties surrounding trade policy and geopolitics.

news.headline: Entropy Robotics partners with SRI to enhance autonomous navigation in tough conditions. AI startup, SRI collaborate on advanced tech; dates back to March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Today, in Montclair, New Jersey, Entropy Robotics, a groundbreaking startup specializing in AI-powered autonomous software for robots and drones, revealed their latest partnership. The company has entered into a strategic collaboration with SRI, a significant player in the field. Through this collaboration, Entropy Robotics will be working on an Autonomous Navigation project with SRI International, emphasizing the importance of advancing technology in the realm of robotics and artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Soft2Bet to launch award-winning iGaming solutions in US, including MEGA product. New brand in NJ. - PRNewswire, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: Soft2Bet, a rapidly expanding company, will soon introduce a revolutionary MEGA product that aims to redefine gamification, boost engagement, and tailor player experiences. The new iGaming brand by Soft2Bet is set to launch in New Jersey, marking a significant step for the company. The announcement was made in SLIEMA, Malta on March 12, 2025. This move is expected to capture the attention of consumers and industry competitors alike, as it represents a major development in the realm of online gaming. With ambitious plans and innovative strategies, Soft2Bet is positioning itself as a key player in the market.

news.headline: Ana Céspedes appointed CEO of Vitamin Angels, a global health leader. Strong commitment to innovation and health equity.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Goleta, California, Vitamin Angels revealed the selection of Ana Céspedes as the new Chief Executive Officer. Céspedes, a prominent figure in the health sector, brings a wealth of experience and a dedication to promoting innovation, accessibility, and health equity.
